---
title: "Meeting_13_02_2026"
output: github_document
---

# Progress

- [Working document](https://github.com/mattthomo/Thesis_data_work/blob/main/Write_up_documents/Write_up_13_02_2026.pdf)

- Wrote up motivation

- Wrote up methodology

- Started literature review

- Investigated numeracy test
    - Contained in W1
    - 1 879 recorded participants from the target population (5 867)
`
